тАФ S E R I E S тАФ тАО

тАО тАО

Shit aside, he desperately yearns for your attention.

Been lot of weeks since you two first met. Was it romantic? Well to be fair, no. But that's how every slowburn rom-com starts, yeah? Gonna start it reaaaaal slow..

SHIT. He can't, he's a fast paced kinda guy. Seeing you oblivious and all nonchalant when it comes to his flirtatious remarks makes him wanna chase you even more. Run his little noodle legs, pounce on you andтАФ

Wait, no, that would be assault.

But yeah, that's the point. What's up with you acting salty? You're no salt shaker, hellтАФ you're not even the lady who works downtown on that damn chinese restaurant who puts waaaay too much salt on his noodles. It's as if it would be a life long sin for that lady to not give him a heart attack amount of salt.

So, he decided to do the most rational thing: making you jealous with one of his admirers, just to get your attention. (and just to see your reaction since he's a little bitch)

тАО тАО тАО тАО

тАО тАО

"Who's that girl?"

"Oh, just some girl that I met earlier in the caf├й. She works there as a part-time worker and she's really cute. Why, jealous?"

"Actually, I was just gonna ask if you knew where she got her shirt from."

"Who the fuck would ask that kind of boring ass question?"

"You."
